THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWN TAXI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ANY & ALL PORTIONS OF PARCELS A & B, SEAWALL, LOT 340,SF, CA, DAMAGES FOR REASONABLE RENTAL VALUE OF THE PREMISES DETERMIN ED TO BE $9,478 A MONTH (EQUIVALENT TO $325 PER DIEM RENTAL AMOUNT) FROM 5/31/99 UNTIL PREMISES IS VACATED BY TOWN TAXI. PLAINTIFF AWARDED COSTS OF SUIT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.

MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-01-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR JURY TRIAL IN DEPT. 622. VISITING JUDGE R. R. CAMPAGNA. D. CARTER, CLERK. LORETTA NAJARA, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: ATTY. FOR PLTF. JASON P. GONZALEZ AND ATTY. FOR DEFTS. DAVID P. GREEN. NO WITNESSES PRESENT. PRETRIAL MTNS. IN LIMINIE, IN CHAMBERS. ROLL CALL AND OATH TO PROSPECTIVE JURORS ADMINISTERED. TWELVE PROSPECTIVE JURORS SEATED. VOIR DIRE BY COURT AND BOTH COUNSELS. CHALLENGES FOR CAUSE AND PEREMPTORY CHALLENGES BY BOTH COUNSELS. TWELVE JURORS SWORN TO TRY THE CAUSE. CONTD. TO 6/2/99 AT 10:00 A.M. JURORS ADMONISHED.
STATEMENT OF DECISION FILED BY COURT IN ROOM 622 BY VISITNG JUDGE R.R. CAMPAGNA.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $78.00 FOR TRANSACTION 4521P1110000 (JURY FEES), PAYABLE TO JURY SYSTEM, WARRANT #00000000, DATED JUN-30-1999
NOTICE TO APPELLATE DEPARTMENT OF DEFAULT ON APPEAL
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED; JURY TRIAL SET; NOTICE MAILED FILED BY DEFENDANT TOWN TAXI, INC. JURY TRIAL SET FOR JUN-01-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

ROOM 622, VJ R.R CAMPAGNA, LNAJERA, CSR, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR CONTINUING JURY TRIAL, ALL PARTIES, JURORS PRESENT. OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF THE JURY, PLTF'S MOTION IN LIMINE TO EXCLUDE ANY EVIDENCE WITH RESPECT TO THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES OF WAIVER AND ESTOPPEL DENIED. SINCE THERE ARE NO MORE FACTUAL ISSUES TO BE DETERMINED BY THE JURY, COURT DISCHARGED, JURY, THANKED AND EXCUSED. DEFT MOVED FOR A MISTRIAL AND CHANGE OF VENUE-DENIED. MATTER PROCEEDED AS A COURT TRIAL. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED, EXHIBITS INTRODUCED AND ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE. COURT RULED ON THE BENCH JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT, TERMS ON THE RECORD. DEFT'S COUNSEL ORALLY MOVED FOR A STAY OF EXECUTION ON ARGUMENTS STATED INTO THE RECORD. MOTION DENIED. DEFT REQUESTED A STATEMENT OF DECISION WHICH WAS READ INTO THE RECORD. JUDGMENT SUBMITTED AND SIGNED. PLTF'S EXHIBITS 1 & 2 IN EVIDENCE AND DEFT'S EXH. # A & B RETAINED BY COURT PLACED BY CLERK IN AN EXHIBIT ENVELOPE AND DELIVERED TO ROOM

ROOM 622, VJUDGE R.R. CAMPAGNA, E.THRONE, CSR, GGOROSIN, CLERK. C/C FOR DEFT'S MOTION TO STAY OF EXECUTION PENDING APPEAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. ARGUMENTS. MOTION GRANTED, TERMS STATED ON THE RECORD. DEFT TO PREPARE ORDER, SUBMITTTED TO PLTF. FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT GATINE, PHIL TOWN TAXI CRESCO EQUIPMENT SERVICES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

REMITTITUR FILED FOR FAILURE TO DESIGNATE OF RECORD ON APPEAL; A MOTION FOR RELIEF HAS NOT BEEN FILED WITHIN 10 DYAS OF NOTICE OF DEFAULT. THEREFORE, IT IS ORDERED BY THE COURT THAT THE APPEAL IS DISMISSED PURSUANT TO RULE 133 C.
